notes.text: This advisory aggregates security fixes for the golang SRPM in CIQ LTS for Rocky Linux 8.8. It addresses 16 CVEs: CVE-2023-44487, CVE-2023-24534, CVE-2023-24536, CVE-2023-24537, CVE-2023-24538, and 11 more.
notes.title: Description
